security.csp: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' data: blob:; font-src 'self'; connect-src 'self' https://www.alphavantage.co https://api.coingecko.com https://finnhub.io https://newsapi.org https://house-stock-watcher-data.s3-us-west-2.amazonaws.com https://senate-stock-watcher-data.s3-us-west-2.amazonaws.com https://github.com https://objects.githubusercontent.com

bundle.longDescription: A privacy-first desktop app for managing your personal finances. Track transactions, budgets, investments, and subscriptions — all stored locally on your device.
